title: Session 03 — The Cleric and the Witch
bodyText:
# What happened
Inside the impossible house they met **Brolin Darkpass** (joined the party) and **Ms. Judy** — "the one who dines on digits, the wicked witch, the sad bitch." She cooked (conjured pig; Felson requested and **ate a conjured halfling**). Judy and Brolin shared their sickness research (the three stages — [[the-sickness]]).

Her price for help: the **blood-bowl ritual**, done together. Everyone saw pieces of each other's lives — and Judy's past as one of **three hag sisters**: poisoned wells, twisted children, caged kids, ritual absorption — until a **radiant figure slew her sisters and spared her with a whispered command**. Post-ritual: "one good deed can't erase a life of wickedness… but maybe a few thousand will."
